message:
fix(timer): promote coalescing window entries from all wheel levels and overflow

Timer coalescing was missing entries hashed into non-current wheel slots
or sitting in the overflow heap whose deadlines fell within the
coalescing window boundary. These entries would fire late on the next
tick visiting their slot instead of being batched with the current group.

- Add promote_coalescing_window_entries() that scans all wheel levels
  and the overflow heap for entries with deadline <= boundary, moving
  them into the ready vec before the coalescing check runs
- Optimize semaphore waiter removal from O(N) retain scan to O(1)
  pop_front since the granted waiter is proven to be at the deque front
- Minor: remove redundant clone in mpsc_fifo_repro test, fix arena
  whitespace

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
